item.title: 🇺🇦🤝🇷🇺 Russia and Ukraine Exchange 205 POWs Each in Ceasefire-Linked Swap
item.description: Russia and Ukraine exchanged 205 prisoners of war each on Friday, part of an agreement linked to a ceasefire brokered by President Trump. The swap marks one of the largest exchanges since the conflict began.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️🇷🇺 Ukrainian Drone Strike Kills Four in Russian City of Ryazan
item.description: Ukrainian drones killed four people including a child in the central Russian city of Ryazan, damaging high-rise apartment buildings and hitting an industrial facility. The strike comes amid intensifying drone warfare between both nations.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Iran Military Capability Dramatically Degraded, US Admiral Says
item.description: US Central Command commander said American strikes have dealt a major blow to Iran's military and defense industry, leaving Tehran with only a small or moderate ability to strike its neighbors.

item.title: 🇮🇶💰 Iraq Seeks IMF Financial Assistance Amid Iran War Fallout
item.description: Iraqi officials have approached the IMF about securing financial assistance as a result of the Middle East conflict. The war has disrupted trade routes and energy supplies, straining Iraq's economy.

item.title: 🌐🇺🇸🇨🇳 IMF Welcomes US-China Dialogue as Positive for World Economy
item.description: The International Monetary Fund welcomed constructive dialogue between Presidents Trump and Xi, saying reduced tensions between the two largest economies benefits global economic stability.

item.title: 🇦🇪🛢️ UAE Accelerates Pipeline to Double Oil Exports Bypassing Hormuz
item.description: The UAE announced it will accelerate construction of a new oil pipeline to double export capacity through Fujairah by 2027, significantly expanding its ability to bypass the Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Zelenskiy Condemns Russia After Kyiv Apartment Strike Kills 24
item.description: President Zelenskiy called for Moscow to be punished after visiting the rubble of a Kyiv apartment building where a Russian missile strike killed 24 people including three children.

item.title: 📉💰 Global Bonds Tumble as Inflation Fears Mount from Iran War Fallout
item.description: Global bond markets ended a bruising week as economic damage from the Iran conflict prompts investors to expect faster interest rate rises and weaker growth.

item.title: 🇺🇦🏦 IMF Staff to Visit Ukraine for $8.1 Billion Loan Review
item.description: IMF staff will visit Ukraine in coming weeks to review progress on economic reforms and tax base expansion under an $8.1 billion loan program.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇰🇿 Turkey and Kazakhstan Deepen Middle Corridor Cooperation
item.description: President Erdogan oversaw the signing of new agreements during a visit to Kazakhstan, expanding the Middle Corridor trade route that bypasses Russian territory. The move strengthens Turkey's role as a logistics hub connecting Asia and Europe.

item.title: 📈🇨🇳 Asian Markets Uneven as Trump-Xi Summit Overshadowed by Hormuz Crisis
item.description: Stock markets across Asia showed mixed performance as investors assessed the outcome of the Trump-Xi summit. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to the Iran conflict has sent global energy prices soaring, weighing on market sentiment.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇮🇷 John Bolton: Iran is Europe's War Too
item.description: Former US National Security Adviser John Bolton criticized European nations like Spain for staying out of the Iran conflict, arguing that the war directly affects European security and energy interests.

item.title: 🇰🇷🇰🇵 Korean Peninsula Sidelined at US-China Summit
item.description: The Korean Peninsula was conspicuously absent from the Trump-Xi summit agenda, signaling Pyongyang's diminishing priority as the US focuses on Iran and trade disputes. Analysts note the shift reflects changing global priorities.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇦🇿 Analysis: Iran's Future and Its Impact on the South Caucasus
item.description: A new analysis examines three scenarios for Iran's future and how each would affect the strategic landscape of the South Caucasus. Iran borders both Central Asia and the Caucasus, making its stability crucial for regional powers including Armenia, Azerbaijan, and Russia.

item.title: 🇫🇮 Finland Reopens Helsinki Airport After Drone Alert
item.description: Finnish authorities cleared a drone threat in the capital region, ending a temporary shutdown of Helsinki Airport. Fighter jets were scrambled before the alert was lifted.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇦🇪⚔️ Saudi Arabia and UAE Conducted Secret Air Strikes on Iran
item.description: US officials revealed that Gulf Arab states carried out covert attacks inside Iran during the US-Israel war, seeking to deter Iran after American security guarantees proved limited.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🌾 US Expects Major Chinese Farm Purchases After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: USTR Jamieson Greer announced China will commit to "double-digit billions" in US agricultural imports following the Beijing summit between Presidents Trump and Xi.

item.title: ⛪⚠️ Pope Leo Condemns AI Warfare as Path to "Spiral of Annihilation"
item.description: Pope Leo XIV denounced investments in AI-driven weaponry, warning they lead humanity toward destruction and criticized Europe's military buildup as a betrayal of diplomacy.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇵🇱🪖 US Abruptly Cancels 4,000-Troop Deployment to Poland
item.description: The Pentagon canceled plans to send 4,000 troops to Poland, raising fresh concerns about US commitment to NATO amid broader discussions about reducing American forces in Europe.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Trump Wraps Beijing Summit as Xi Warns on Taiwan
item.description: President Trump concluded his China visit with economic deals including Boeing jet orders, but Xi Jinping warned that mishandling Taiwan could lead to conflict. The summit produced business agreements but left Iran and Taiwan tensions unresolved.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 AP: Trump Insists US-China Relations Good Despite Differences
item.description: As Trump wrapped up his Beijing trip, he maintained that US-China relations are in a good place despite unresolved differences on Taiwan and Iran. The trip focused more on pageantry and symbolism than major breakthroughs.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ CBS: Iran Ready to Repel New US Attack as Peace Talks Stall
item.description: Iran's military said it is trained and ready for any new US assault as peace talks remain stalled. Trump is in China discussing the Iran conflict with Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🇮🇳⛽ India Hikes Fuel Prices for First Time in Four Years
item.description: India's state-run refiners raised fuel prices for the first time in four years as crude prices surged due to the Iran war, adding pressure to millions facing cooking gas shortages.

item.title: ⚔️ CENTCOM Chief: Iran Threat Diminished But Not Eliminated
item.description: Admiral Brad Cooper told the Senate Armed Services Committee that the US bombing campaign has degraded 90% of Iran naval mines, but Tehran retains limited strike capability on regional neighbors amid ongoing Strait of Hormuz standoff.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia Floats Non-Aggression Pact With Iran
item.description: Riyadh has proposed a regional non-aggression agreement modeled on the 1975 Helsinki Accords, gaining European support but facing uncertainty over US and Israeli backing amid the ongoing Iran conflict.
